name: glamis
description: This is a mock interview portal designed for the students of GLA University to prepare for interviews.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client,admin-client -c yellow,blue,green "cd backend && npm i && npm run dev" "cd client && npm i && npm run dev" "cd admin-client && npm i && npm run dev"
scripts.prod: concurrently -n server,client,admin-client -c yellow,blue,green "cd backend && npm i && npm start" "cd client && npm i && npm run build && npm run preview" "cd admin-client && npm i && npm run build && npm run preview"
